flaggedZones.instruction: Add participial connectors and a few compound joins through Miri's account of the outbreak so the recap chains less as isolated beats.
In the trapdoor recollection, join the short statements with clause-level connective tissue—especially ', Ving' phrases or one semicolon—to break the stacked short-line run.
Enrich the wagon-arrival sequence with participial phrases tied to movement and reaction, so the reveal unfolds in linked motion rather than stop-start beats.
Combine the trader's first visual read and spoken reaction using compound clauses or a semicolon; reduce the chain of bare declaratives.
During the grain-seller exchange, add connective syntax between question, answer, and inference—prefer compound sentences over isolated short turns.
The follow-up questioning run needs fewer standalone short sentences; merge adjacent beats with conjunctions and at least one semicolon where the logic is paired.

textureFindings.priorityInstruction: Participial density is the biggest miss at 6.8% against a 12.0% target, so add ', Ving' connective phrases in every flagged zone first; then raise semicolon usage slightly in analytical dialogue to lift the texture score above floor.
